channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why Nigel Farage Will Never Be Prime Minister
item.description: Reform UK’s recent victories in local elections are a double-edged sword for the party leader.

item.title: Montana voters will be able to register to vote on Election Day, judge rules
item.description: A Montana judge has blocked the state from limiting voter registration on Election Day, concluding the move would disproportionately harm Native Ameri...

item.title: Ignoring the Debt Won’t Make It Go Away
item.description: The nation’s debt is much worse than during the 2011 debt ceiling crisis — but both parties are further away than ever from seriously tackling the iss...

item.title: Trump sides with Senate in dispute over housing legislation
item.description: President Trump is wading into a monthslong congressional dispute over legislation to expand access to housing, asking House lawmakers to clear a Sena...
